action: Build a repository-wide projection loader that resolves source commits and evidence paths, groups updates by queue item, invokes the reconciler, and emits a reversible materialization candidate without changing ACTIVE_QUEUE.json.
observed: Projection files can be discovered and preserved with source paths.
Referenced commits and evidence files are checked before reconciliation.
The generated candidate never mutates canonical state.
inferred: A materialization candidate is safer than direct queue mutation because authority and conflict review remain explicit.
proposed: Define a signed or policy-bound canonical materialization authority after repository snapshot consistency is implemented.
superseded: Manual one-item projection inspection as the only reconciliation path.
unresolved: Fresh-checkout or CI execution of the committed test suite is not observed.
Concurrent repository writes can still create a mixed-time snapshot.
next_action: Add snapshot binding: resolve one repository HEAD, read ACTIVE_QUEUE and all projection/evidence blobs from that immutable tree, then bind the candidate digest to the source commit before any authority review.
